sections.paragraph:
Original: יון

Transliteration: yâvân

Phonetic: yaw-vawn'

BDB Definition:

Javan = "Ionia" or " Greece"
  1. a son of Japheth and grandson of Noah (noun proper masculine)
  2. Greece, Ionia, Ionians (noun proper locative)
    1. location of descendants of Javan

Origin: probably from the same as H3196

TWOT entry: 855

Part(s) of speech:
